title: dolichos pungens
intro: Dolichos pungens, also known as Horse Gram or Kollu, is a leguminous plant native to India and parts of Asia, characterized by its small, green pods and seeds. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The seeds of Dolichos pungens are rich in protein, fiber, and various minerals, offering several health benefits such as lowering cholesterol levels, improving digestion, and supporting weight management. Dolichos pungens is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, powders, and capsules, which are used to treat various health conditions, including diabetes, hypertension, and digestive disorders.
